name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 27 Jun 2024
body: [{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW:","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Greetings Maropostians!!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"We are pleased to announce that we have introduced a significant update to our next-generation segment builder."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Kindly read ahead to learn more!! "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"ENHANCEMENT:","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Previously, marketers would have to manually input the rules and criteria while building a segment. Although the builder is intuitive in nature, it tends to be time-consuming while building large and complex segments."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To navigate around this issue, we have implemented an "},{"text":"AI Builder","bold":true},{"text":" toolkit to assist you in constructing segment rules to ease your task."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"With the help of "},{"text":"Natural Language Processing","bold":true},{"text":" ("},{"text":"NLP","bold":true},{"text":") logic, you only need to add a keyword or a sentence that depicts how the segment rule should be built and what type of contact it needs to fetch."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/segment32.068J1000001YKj6IAG.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/segment32.068J1000001YKj6IAG.png","name":"segment32","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1288,"width":2880}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can preview the rule layout and the contact records that fulfill the criteria. Once satisfied, you can generate the rules and criteria in no time. "}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/segment33.068J1000001YIluIAG.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/segment33.068J1000001YIluIAG.png","name":"segment33","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1322,"width":2880}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"With the AI builder, marketers can generate multiple rules and criteria in a segment fairly quickly."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/segment34.068J1000001YKhxIAG.gif","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/segment34.068J1000001YKhxIAG.gif","name":"segment34","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1644,"width":2880}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more about building segments, both manually and through an automated process via an AI builder, read our "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Creating-Segments-with-Next-Gen-Segment-Builder","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Creating Segments with Next-Gen Segment Builder","bold":true}]},{"text":" article."}]}]}]
